gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review returned no findings for the PEP 561 marker files, package include metadata, README note, or marker tests.
verification: Built wheel zip inspection confirmed document_kv_cache/py.typed and restaurant_kv_serving/py.typed are present.
what_changed: Added py.typed markers to document_kv_cache and restaurant_kv_serving.
Included both marker files explicitly in sdist and wheel artifacts.
Documented that installed wheels expose inline type annotations.
Added tests that require both marker files and package include metadata.
why: Open-source users should be able to consume the package's inline type annotations from installed distributions while legacy imports remain typed during migration.
